scripts.dev: npm run dev:worker & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.audit:prod: npm run audit:worker:prod && npm run audit:frontend:prod
scripts.test: npm --prefix worker run test && node --test frontend/tests/*.test.js
scripts.lint: npm --prefix worker run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.format:check: npm --prefix worker run format:check && npm --prefix frontend run format:check
scripts.format: npm --prefix worker run format && npm --prefix frontend run format
